slides.hook_text: THIS DAD AND DAUGHTER {CONVO GOES VIRAL}
slides.subtitle: And honestly we understand why

messages.text: why are you talking to your phone about clothes again
im asking AI what to wear dad
your mother does that for free
she picks the wrong things every time lol
wait so the phone just picks your outfit?
yes and tries real outfits on you. from actual brands
does it work for dads too

slides.text:
Yes it works for dads too.

Just type what style you want - AI picks real outfits from real brands and tries them on you in seconds.
